extract: Munchlax (Japanese: ゴンベ Gonbe) is a Normal-type baby Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves into Snorlax when leveled up with high friendship. It was the first Generation IV Pokémon to be revealed to the public, in May 2004. Along with Starly and Pachirisu, Munchlax is one of the three Partner Pokémon of Almia available at the beginning of Pokémon Ranger: Shadows of Almia.
